title: CleanWater
description: This texture pack,makes water more clear,and opaque in a subtle way.
body:
![LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8710b07799dbeb094131d1e034361eaba347fc1c.png)

# EVERY 30% OF THE REVENUE GOES TO CHARITY.

# **Features: ✅**

**-CleanWater**

**-See underwater (Only Possible with Combination of Fullbright and CleanWater)**

**-No water fog**

# **Buttons**
